summary: Tested all 3 feature fixes: Mira navigation links, PAW PASS display for Mojo (dipali), and NPS/Pawmoter modal + API endpoints. Fixed 2 bugs: GlobalNav 'Ask Mira' still routing to /mira-os, and HTTPException swallowed by generic except in member_rewards_routes.py.

minor.issue: HTTPException(400) for invalid score was caught by generic 'except Exception' block, returning 500 instead of 400. FIXED: added 'except HTTPException: raise' before generic handler.

integration_issues.flow: GlobalNav Ask Mira button (secondary nav in My Pets)
integration_issues.issue: GlobalNav.jsx line 177 was navigate('/mira-demo') which redirects to /mira-os. FIXED: changed to navigate('/mira-search').

paw_pass_display.pet_pass_card_renders: PASS - PetPassCard shown with Foundation plan, valid dates
paw_pass_display.all_pets_have_pass_status: PASS - all pets enriched with pet_pass_status

nps_modal_component.modal_not_testable_live: NPS modal requires 3rd completed order to trigger - cannot be triggered in UI test without completing checkout

action_items: Review remaining /mira-demo navigation links in: PillarPageLayout.jsx (line 343), SoulKnowledgeTicker.jsx (line 341), CareServiceFlowModal.jsx (line 299), GroomingFlowModal.jsx (line 381), PicksHistoryTab.jsx (line 247) - these all route to /mira-demo → /mira-os. Decide if these should also point to /mira-search.
Consider updating the MiraDemoRedirect in App.js to redirect to /mira-search instead of /mira-os if the Mira OS page is now deprecated.
NPS modal can only be tested via live checkout flow (3rd completed order). Consider adding a ?test_nps=true query param for manual triggering in dev/test.
critical_code_review_comments: GlobalNav.jsx: 'Ask Mira' button was navigate('/mira-demo') → /mira-os (missed fix). FIXED to navigate('/mira-search').
member_rewards_routes.py: Generic 'except Exception' was swallowing HTTPException(400), returning 500. FIXED with 'except HTTPException: raise' guard.
PawmoterNPSModal.jsx: handleSubmit does not check response.ok before setting submitted=true — silent failure if API returns error.
MiraDemoRedirect still redirects /mira-demo → /mira-os. With 6+ places still linking to /mira-demo, the Mira OS page is still reachable via these routes.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all key features verified, NPS modal not live-testable without checkout flow)

seed_data_creation: NPS submissions created for dipali@clubconcierge.in during testing (2 submissions at score=9)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GlobalNav.jsx 'Ask Mira' button fixed from /mira-demo to /mira-search. Backend NPS endpoints tested (13 tests). PAW PASS for Mojo (dipali) showing TDC-516B445F and ACTIVE. NPS modal component has all required data-testids per code review but was not live-tested due to requiring 3rd order completion. Remaining /mira-demo links in 5 files still route to /mira-os - main agent needs to decide if these should be updated.
